data.title: Levi Strauss grows ecommerce, overall sales in Q1
data.description: New consumers are primarily discovering Levi Strauss through digital channels and tend to skew younger than other customers, the retailer's CEO said.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What is AI's role in resale growth?
data.description: Established online players and young startups see specific opportunities for AI to fuel growing resale demand.

data.title: Rezolve Ai takes merger proposal to Commerce.com's shareholders
data.description: Commerce.com board says Rezolve Ai is undervaluing shares in its recent offers to combine the two companies.

data.title: Dell use case for agentic AI could revolve around search rather than commerce
data.description: There has been an uptick in traffic from agentic AI, but "nothing to the point that is earth-shaking or completely shattering for me just yet," an executive told Digital Commerce 360.

data.title: Oracle bets on agentic AI for its procurement solutions, adding new app to SCM
data.description: Its Design-to-Source Workspace is intended to leverage agentic AI to speed up processes between the design stage and requests for quotes.
